info.name: SFA Employee Master API
info.description:
CRUD API for Employee Master.

Table: Tbl_Emp_Mst

Pre-requisite:
1. Login using the Auth collection first
2. The Login request auto-saves accessToken to collection variables
3. All requests here use {{accessToken}} automatically

Dependencies:
- Designation (c_desig) must exist in tbl_desig_mst
- Department (c_dept_code) must exist in tbl_department_mst
- Reporting Manager (c_parent) must exist in Tbl_Emp_Mst

Search behavior:
- Default (no search / empty) -> returns empty data.
- emp_name=* or emp_code=* -> returns all active records.
- emp_name=keyword or emp_code=keyword -> case-insensitive search matching name or code.

variable.description: Paste your accessToken here, or run Login from Auth collection first
Code of the employee to update/delete

item.name: Pre-requisite Dependency Lookups (Foreign Keys)

request.description: Helper request to retrieve active designations. Use a returned 'c_code' for the 'c_desig' parameter in employee creation/updates.
Helper request to retrieve active departments. Use a returned 'C_Code' for the 'c_dept_code' parameter in employee creation/updates.
Helper request to retrieve valid department and office locations. Use a returned value for the 'c_loc_code' parameter in employee creation/updates.

item.description: Requests to list active Designation, Department, and Location codes. Run these first to find valid reference keys for creating or updating employee files.

request.description: Retrieves the next suggested numeric employee code (incremented from highest existing numeric code).

request.description:
Creates a new employee record.

Fields:
- c_emp_code (required): Manually specified alphanumeric code.
- c_name_prefix (required): Title (Mr., Ms., etc.)
- c_name (required): Unique employee name
- c_sex (required): Sex/Gender
- c_desig (required): Designation code (must exist in tbl_desig_mst)
- c_dept_code (required): Department code (must exist in tbl_department_mst)
- c_loc_code (required): Location
- c_role (required): Role(s)
- c_emp_type (required): 1 for Permanent, 2 for Contract

response.name: Error - Missing Required Fields

request.description: By default (empty search), returns an empty data block immediately without querying the database.
Retrieves all active employee profiles paginated.

request.description:
Updates an existing employee profile fields.

The Code (passed as route parameter) cannot be modified.
Soft deletes an employee record (sets N_Deleted = 1).
